SEARCH
Package com.nib.grammars

Class Db2OnlineUtilitiesParserBaseListener

java.lang.Object
com.nib.grammars.Db2OnlineUtilitiesParserBaseListener
All Implemented Interfaces:
Db2OnlineUtilitiesParserListener, org.antlr.v4.runtime.tree.ParseTreeListener
public class Db2OnlineUtilitiesParserBaseListener extends Object implements Db2OnlineUtilitiesParserListener
This class provides an empty implementation of Db2OnlineUtilitiesParserListener, which can be extended to create a listener which only needs to handle a subset of the available methods.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
